title: Fantasy Football Trilogy
html:
The three-year longitudinal record of Yahir's draft thinking — same note format, three consecutive seasons.

The trilogy

  • 2022 06 14 get josh allen — 2022 season. Top conviction: Josh Allen (the title). Justin Jefferson + CeeDee Lamb at WR. Derrick Henry RB1. 9-person friend league roster.
  • 2024 07 30 fantasy football — 2024 season. Top conviction: Breece Hall + Kincaid target share. Hurts/Allen/Lamar QB stack.
  • 2025 03 09 fantasy 2025 26 — 2025–26 season. Top conviction: Bijan + Gibbs + Jeanty rookie-RB heavy. Plus the unique line "Chase Brown will be a household name."

Why the trilogy matters

  • The best longitudinal data on conviction-pattern in any single domain in the corpus.
  • Diff-able: 2022 = QB-led, 2024 = HB target share, 2025 = rookie RB-heavy.
  • Same friend league likely persists across all three years (the 2025 Boys Quiz confirms ongoing camaraderie).
  • The buy-in math ($500 in 2025) and avoid lists (DeVonta/JT/Mixon/Najee in 2025) are useful for the 2023 12 31 betting within boys app peer-bet-app inspiration.
